Title: Establishes a sales tax exemption for the purchase of electric wheelchair accessible vehicles
Summary: Establishes a sales tax exemption for the purchase of electric vehicles that are designed for the purpose of transporting persons in wheelchairs or containing any physical device or alteration designed to permit access to and enable the transportation of persons in wheelchairs.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to establishing a sales tax exemption for the purchase of electric wheelchair accessible vehicles
